name: yaver-browser-extension
description: Yaver browser extension — capture any web UI as an AI-readable reference (DOM + computed styles + screenshot) and feed it to your local Yaver agent for vibe coding. Manifest V3, no build step, Selenium/Playwright/Puppeteer compatible.

scripts.pack: zip -r yaver-extension.zip manifest.json background.js content.js overlay.css popup.html popup.js icons/
